name: design-large
description: Full design team with design systems, motion design, and accessibility specialists

agents.name: UX Designer
agents.goal: Design intuitive user experiences through research and prototyping

agents.name: UI Designer
agents.goal: Create visually consistent interface designs aligned with the design system

agents.name: UX Researcher
agents.goal: Conduct user interviews, usability tests, and synthesize findings into actionable insights

agents.name: Content Designer
agents.goal: Craft clear, concise UI copy and establish content guidelines

agents.name: Design Systems Engineer
agents.goal: Build and maintain the shared component library and design tokens

agents.name: Accessibility Specialist
agents.goal: Audit designs and implementations for WCAG compliance and inclusive design
